mechanics.name: Drive Impact
mechanics.description: A powerful strike that can absorb incoming attacks and wall-splat opponents.

mechanics.name: Drive Parry
mechanics.description: Repel attacks and restore Drive Gauge. Perfect Parries provide a massive frame advantage.

mechanics.name: Drive Rush
mechanics.description: A quick dash forward that enhances the next normal attack's frame advantage.

mechanics.name: Drive Reversal
mechanics.description: A counter-attack executed while blocking to push the opponent away.

mechanics.name: Overdrive (OD)
mechanics.description: Enhanced special moves that consume Drive Gauge instead of Super Meter.

mechanics.name: Roll (C, A, N Grooves)
mechanics.description: An invincible forward or backward evasive roll.

mechanics.name: Dodge (P, S Grooves)
mechanics.description: A spot dodge that avoids attacks and allows for a counter-attack.

mechanics.name: Just Defend (K Groove)
mechanics.description: Blocking right before an attack hits restores health, builds meter, and slightly reduces blockstun.

mechanics.name: Parry (P Groove)
mechanics.description: Deflects incoming attacks, leaving the opponent vulnerable with zero blockstun.

mechanics.name: Tactical Recovery
mechanics.description: Delays your wake-up timing after being knocked down.

mechanics.name: Safe Fall
mechanics.description: Quickly recover from being knocked down to avoid wake-up pressure.

mechanics.name: Roman Cancel (RC)
mechanics.description: Slows down time and cancels the recovery of your current action. Red (offensive), Yellow (defensive), Purple (whiff), Blue (neutral).

mechanics.name: Psych Burst
mechanics.description: An invincible blast that knocks the opponent away. Blue Burst breaks combos; Gold Burst builds meter.

mechanics.name: Faultless Defense (FD)
mechanics.description: A stronger block that prevents chip damage and pushes the opponent further back, consuming Tension.

mechanics.name: Wild Assault
mechanics.description: A forward-advancing strike that consumes 50% of the Burst Gauge.

mechanics.name: Deflect Shield
mechanics.description: A defensive maneuver that repels the opponent significantly on block, consuming 50% of the Burst Gauge.

mechanics.name: Dash / Air Dash
mechanics.description: Quick movement on the ground or in the air.
